en: Our third speaker is Dimitra Dantageliou.
She is a psychologist, a professor of photography,
she has worked for 10 years in the TV and in the media,
and then she decided to move to a small village in Pelion,
ko: 그 후 펠리온의 작은 마을로 이사하기로 결심했습니다.

en: like the Galatian village that the Romans do not understand,
and from there, she lives in the center of things,
ko: 그곳에서 그녀는 세상의 중심에 살고 있습니다.

en: through re-centering. That is, she has made her own website, www.psychi.gr,
ko: 재중심화를 통해서요. 즉, 자신의 웹사이트 psychi.gr을 만들어,

en: in which she provides the service of mental health to people,
as well as the magazine, for some time now,
in which she has clients in Europe and America.
